dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: My head... what the hell happened?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The familiar ceiling above him was gone, replaced by rough-hewn stone. The air, thick with dust and the metallic scent of blood, was definitely not his apartment.

dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: This isn't my room. This isn't even my apartment building. This... this is the 'Tower of Trials'.

dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: The game I spent ten years mastering, 'Tower of Trials'. It became reality.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: Welcome, Player. The 'Tower of Trials' has begun.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: Objective: Conquer the Tower.

dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: Conquer the Tower? Easy for you to say. Most people are probably freaking out right now.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Around him, countless others lay sprawled on the cold ground, just as confused. Some were screaming, others crying, their faces etched with terror.

dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: Pathetic. But understandable. This isn't a game for them. It's a death sentence.

dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: But for me... this is a second chance. A chance to use everything I learned.

dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: Alright, let's see the damage.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: Player: Jinhyuk

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: Level: 1

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: Strength: 10, Agility: 10, Stamina: 10, Magic: 10, Luck: 10

dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: Base stats. As expected. But my knowledge... that's my real stat.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A faint, ominous glow emanated from a nearby archway. The first floor. The tutorial area.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GROWL

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A grotesque green-skinned creature, barely taller than a child, lunged forward with a rusty dagger. A Goblin.

dialogue.speaker: Other Player 1
dialogue.line: A-a monster!

dialogue.speaker: Other Player 2
dialogue.line: Help!

dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: Amateurs. They don't even know how to hold a stick.

dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: Goblins. Weak to blunt force, slow reaction time. Standard tutorial fodder.

dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: Move.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACK

dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: No weapons yet. Fine. My fists are enough for these low-level trash.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SMASH

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: You have defeated a Goblin.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: You have gained 10 EXP.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: Level Up! Level: 2

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: Stat points acquired: 5

dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: As expected. The grind begins. Strength: +3, Agility: +2. Prioritize what's needed for early game efficiency.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: More goblins appeared, drawn by the commotion. Jinhyuk moved like a phantom, a blur of calculated strikes, each one precise and lethal.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SLASH! THWACK! CRUNCH!

dialogue.speaker: Other Player 3
dialogue.line: H-how... he's so fast!

dialogue.speaker: Other Player 4
dialogue.line: Is he... a pro gamer?

dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: Pro gamer? More like a max-level veteran trapped in a newbie's body. And this is just the beginning.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: You have completed the quest 'Clear the First Floor Tutorial Area'.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: Reward: Skill 'Basic Swordsmanship (F)', 100 EXP, 50 Gold.

dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: Basic Swordsmanship... useful. But I know where the real treasure lies.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A new portal shimmered, leading deeper into the Tower, beckoning him towards the next challenge.

dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: Alright, Tower. Let's see if you can still surprise me.

dialogue.speaker: Jinhyuk
dialogue.line: This isn't a game anymore. This is my new reality. And I'm going to dominate it.

summary: Jinhyuk, a former pro gamer, wakes up to find himself in the 'Tower of Trials'—the game he mastered, now a deadly reality. While others panic, Jinhyuk calmly assesses his situation and uses his max-level knowledge to efficiently clear the first floor's goblin tutorial, setting the stage for his dominance.
